meaning: n.特别喜欢的人(或物),喜欢的事物,亲信,心腹,幸运儿adj.喜爱的,宠爱的,中意的
examples: What's your favorite and less favorite Chinese food?
What's your favorite food? My favorite food is salad.
Pharycde's isn't the message with "Passing Me By, " which is one of my all-time favorite songs.
People love to bet on the favorite, ask any Vegas Bookie and they will tell you.
